mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (public_id, user_id, caption, has_location, latitude, longitude, taken_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{caption}, #{hasLocation}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{takenAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO post_images (post_id, sort_order, storage_type, object_key, file_extension, size_bytes, exif_available, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{sortOrder}, #{storageType}, #{objectKey}, #{fileExtension}, #{sizeBytes}, #{exifAvailable}, #{createdAt})
